The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] employed the [[cargo ferry]] '''''Bujiboi''''' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ''Bujiboi'' arrived near [[XQ3 Platform]] ''[[Pondut]]'' during the "[[Arms Race]]" after [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] assault forces had successfully disabled all [[Galactic Electronics]] craft in the system. Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] attacked Ferry ''Bujiboi'' while [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|Assault Transports]] stripped the platform of all technology.

==Behind the scenes==
In [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] ''Bujiboi'' has orders to dock with a Galactic Electronics container containing [[Mag-pulse warhead/Legends|magnetic pulse]] equipment. The [[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]] does not elaborate on the ultimate fate of Ferry ''Bujiboi'', stating only that [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele's]] wingmates attack the vessel. Players are fully capable of destroying the craft in-game; however, its canon demise is unknown.
